calendar.matters:
Respondent Department Of Motor Vehicless Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jan-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John McGlothin of Office of the Attorney General telephone number 510-622-2224 for Respondent Department of Motor Vehicles.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES' Motion To Dismiss Petitioner Eric Kleinbub's Petition for Writ of Mandate for Failure to Effect Timely Service and/or Delay in Prosecution is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. (302/EG)
